27:

22: // TestCliPaginateCredentials asserts that the CLI automatically paginates to retrieve
23: // all credentials in a single invocation.
24: func TestCliPaginateCredentials(t *testing.T) {
25: 	e2e.MaybeSkipTest(t)
26: 	t.Skip("Skipping test due to 'large estimated count' bug: ICU-16649")
27: 	c, err := loadTestConfig()
28: 	require.NoError(t, err)
29: 
30: 	ctx := context.Background()
31: 	boundary.AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
32: 	orgId, err := boundary.CreateOrgCli(t, ctx)
33: 	require.NoError(t, err)

36: 		boundary.AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
37: 		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary", e2e.WithArgs("scopes", "delete", "-id", orgId))
38: 		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
39: 	})
40: 	projectId, err := boundary.CreateProjectCli(t, ctx, orgId)
41: 	require.NoError(t, err)
42: 	storeId, err := boundary.CreateCredentialStoreStaticCli(t, ctx, projectId)
43: 	require.NoError(t, err)
44: 
45: 	// Create enough credentials to overflow a single page.
46: 	client, err := boundary.NewApiClient()
47: 	require.NoError(t, err)
48: 	cClient := credentials.NewClient(client)
49: 	var credentialIds []string
50: 	for i := 0; i < c.MaxPageSize+1; i++ {
51: 		resp, err := cClient.Create(
52: 			ctx,
53: 			"username_password",
54: 			storeId,
55: 			credentials.WithUsernamePasswordCredentialUsername("user"),
56: 			credentials.WithUsernamePasswordCredentialPassword("password"),
57: 		)
58: 		require.NoError(t, err)
59: 		credentialIds = append(
60: 			credentialIds,
61: 			resp.Item.Id,
62: 		)
63: 	}
64: 
65: 	// List credentials
66: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
67: 		e2e.WithArgs(
68: 			"credentials", "list",
69: 			"-credential-store-id", storeId,
70: 			"-format=json",
71: 		),
72: 	)
73: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
74: 
75: 	var initialCredentials credentials.CredentialListResult
76: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &initialCredentials)
77: 	require.NoError(t, err)
78: 
79: 	var returnedIds []string
80: 	for _, cred := range initialCredentials.Items {
81: 		returnedIds = append(returnedIds, cred.Id)
82: 	}
83: 
84: 	require.Len(t, initialCredentials.Items, c.MaxPageSize+1)
85: 	assert.Empty(t, cmp.Diff(returnedIds, credentialIds, cmpopts.SortSlices(func(i, j string) bool { return i < j })))
86: 	assert.Empty(t, initialCredentials.ResponseType)
87: 	assert.Empty(t, initialCredentials.RemovedIds)
88: 	assert.Empty(t, initialCredentials.ListToken)
89: 
90: 	// Create a new credential and destroy one of the other credentials
91: 	credentialId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli(t, ctx, storeId, "user", "password")
92: 	require.NoError(t, err)
93: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
94: 		e2e.WithArgs(
95: 			"credentials", "delete",
96: 			"-id", initialCredentials.Items[0].Id,
97: 		),
98: 	)
99: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
100: 
101: 	// List again, should have the new credential but not the deleted credential
102: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",

107: 		),
108: 	)

113: 	require.NoError(t, err)
114: 
115: 	require.Len(t, newCredentials.Items, c.MaxPageSize+1)
116: 	// The first item should be the most recently created, which
117: 	// should be our new credential
118: 	firstItem := newCredentials.Items[0]
119: 	assert.Equal(t, credentialId, firstItem.Id)
120: 	assert.Empty(t, newCredentials.ResponseType)
121: 	assert.Empty(t, newCredentials.RemovedIds)
122: 	assert.Empty(t, newCredentials.ListToken)
123: 	// Ensure the deleted credential isn't returned
124: 	for _, credential := range newCredentials.Items {
125: 		assert.NotEqual(t, credential.Id, initialCredentials.Items[0].Id)
126: 	}
127: }

129: // TestApiPaginateCredentials asserts that the API automatically paginates to retrieve
130: // all Credentials in a single invocation.
131: func TestApiPaginateCredentials(t *testing.T) {
132: 	e2e.MaybeSkipTest(t)
133: 	t.Skip("Skipping test due to 'large estimated count' bug: ICU-16649")
134: 	c, err := loadTestConfig()
135: 	require.NoError(t, err)
136: 
137: 	client, err := boundary.NewApiClient()
138: 	require.NoError(t, err)
139: 	ctx := context.Background()
140: 	sClient := scopes.NewClient(client)
141: 	cClient := credentials.NewClient(client)
142: 	orgId, err := boundary.CreateOrgApi(t, ctx, client)
143: 	require.NoError(t, err)
144: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
145: 		ctx := context.Background()
146: 		_, err := sClient.Delete(ctx, orgId)
147: 		require.NoError(t, err)
148: 	})
149: 	projectId, err := boundary.CreateProjectApi(t, ctx, client, orgId)
150: 	require.NoError(t, err)
151: 	storeId, err := boundary.CreateCredentialStoreStaticApi(t, ctx, client, projectId)
152: 	require.NoError(t, err)
153: 
154: 	// Create enough credentials to overflow a single page.
155: 	var credentialIds []string
156: 	for i := 0; i < c.MaxPageSize+1; i++ {
157: 		resp, err := cClient.Create(
158: 			ctx,
159: 			"username_password",
160: 			storeId,
161: 			credentials.WithUsernamePasswordCredentialUsername("user"),
162: 			credentials.WithUsernamePasswordCredentialPassword("password"),
163: 		)
164: 		require.NoError(t, err)
165: 		credentialIds = append(
166: 			credentialIds,
167: 			resp.Item.Id,
168: 		)
169: 	}
170: 
171: 	// List Credentials
172: 	initialCredentials, err := cClient.List(ctx, storeId)
173: 	require.NoError(t, err)
174: 
175: 	var returnedIds []string
176: 	for _, cred := range initialCredentials.Items {
177: 		returnedIds = append(returnedIds, cred.Id)
178: 	}
179: 
180: 	require.Len(t, initialCredentials.Items, c.MaxPageSize+1)
181: 	assert.Empty(t, cmp.Diff(returnedIds, credentialIds, cmpopts.SortSlices(func(i, j string) bool { return i < j })))
182: 	assert.Equal(t, "complete", initialCredentials.ResponseType)
183: 	assert.Empty(t, initialCredentials.RemovedIds)
184: 	assert.NotEmpty(t, initialCredentials.ListToken)
185: 	mapItems, ok := initialCredentials.GetResponse().Map["items"]
186: 	require.True(t, ok)
187: 	mapSliceItems, ok := mapItems.([]any)
188: 	require.True(t, ok)
189: 	assert.Len(t, mapSliceItems, c.MaxPageSize+1)
190: 
191: 	// Create a new credential and destroy one of the other Credentials
192: 	credentialId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPasswordApi(t, ctx, client, storeId, "user", "password")
193: 	require.NoError(t, err)
194: 	_, err = cClient.Delete(ctx, initialCredentials.Items[0].Id)
195: 	require.NoError(t, err)
196: 
197: 	// List again, should have the new and deleted credential
198: 	newCredentials, err := cClient.List(ctx, storeId, credentials.WithListToken(initialCredentials.ListToken))
199: 	require.NoError(t, err)
200: 
201: 	// Note that this will likely contain all the credentials,
202: 	// since they were created very shortly before the listing,
203: 	// and we add a 30 second buffer to the lower bound of update
204: 	// times when listing.
205: 	require.GreaterOrEqual(t, len(newCredentials.Items), 1)
206: 	// The first item should be the most recently created, which
207: 	// should be our new credential
208: 	firstItem := newCredentials.Items[0]
209: 	assert.Equal(t, credentialId, firstItem.Id)
210: 	assert.Equal(t, "complete", newCredentials.ResponseType)
211: 	// Note that the removed IDs may contain entries from other tests,
212: 	// so just check that there is at least 1 entry and that our entry
213: 	// is somewhere in the list.
214: 	require.GreaterOrEqual(t, len(newCredentials.RemovedIds), 1)
215: 	assert.True(t, slices.ContainsFunc(newCredentials.RemovedIds, func(credentialId string) bool {
216: 		return credentialId == initialCredentials.Items[0].Id
217: 	}))
218: 	assert.NotEmpty(t, newCredentials.ListToken)
219: 	// Check that the response map contains all entries
220: 	mapItems, ok = newCredentials.GetResponse().Map["items"]
221: 	require.True(t, ok)
222: 	mapSliceItems, ok = mapItems.([]any)
223: 	require.True(t, ok)
224: 	assert.GreaterOrEqual(t, len(mapSliceItems), 1)
225: }

134: 	}

137: 	if err != nil {

139: 	}
140: 	return strings.TrimSpace(string(buf[:n])), nil
